hero.subhead: Hand-shaved döner, charcoal-grilled skewers and bread straight off the heat — Mon to Fri on a corner of Biel/Bienne. Open 08:00 to 20:00.
hero.caption: From the grill

menu.sectionTitle: Cooked to order, off the spit.
menu.intro: Three stations in the kitchen — the spit at the front, the charcoal grill behind it, and the cold mezze counter to share. Most plates leave the counter in under ten minutes.
menu.sampleNoticeText: Dishes shown represent the kitchen's typical offerings. Daily specials, prices and seasonal items confirmed at the counter or by phone (032 341 32 41).

kebabs.title: From the spit
kebabs.subtitle: Döner · Dürüm
kebabs.intro: The kitchen's centre of gravity. The spit turns from morning to evening, the meat is sliced to order, and the bread is warmed seconds before serving.

grill.title: From the grill
grill.subtitle: Şiş · Adana · Karışık
grill.intro: Skewers cooked to order over glowing charcoal. Served with rice or bulgur, salad and a thin Turkish flatbread.

mezze.title: Mezze & sides
mezze.subtitle: Hummus · salatalar · cacık
mezze.intro: Cold dips, side salads, hand-cut chips. Made for sharing at the table or topping up the takeaway box. Vegetarian by default.

doner.name: Döner in bread
doner.subtitle: Yufka · folded
doner.description: Sliced kebab in a folded yufka with salad, onion and yoghurt-garlic sauce.

durum.name: Dürüm
durum.subtitle: tightly rolled
durum.description: Tightly rolled wrap — kebab, salad, paste, onion.

adana.name: Adana skewer
adana.subtitle: hand-chopped lamb
adana.description: Hand-chopped, spiced lamb · grilled on charcoal · with rice.

karisik.name: Karışık ızgara
karisik.subtitle: mixed grill
karisik.description: Mixed grill — chicken, lamb, peppers, three sauces. For two.

hummus.name: Hummus & pita
hummus.subtitle: chickpea & tahini
hummus.description: Chickpea purée with tahini and lemon, warm pita strips, olive oil.

salat.name: Garden salad
salat.subtitle: vegan as it stands
salat.description: Tomato, cucumber, parsley, red onion, lemon — vegan as it stands.

location.a: General-Dufour-Strasse 47, 2502 Biel/Bienne. Two minutes' walk from Bahnhof Biel along General-Dufour-Strasse.

reservations.a: Walk-in is enough for the counter. For larger groups, please call directly on 032 341 32 41.

phoneOrder.q: Can I order by phone for pickup?
phoneOrder.a: Yes — call 032 341 32 41 and your order will be waiting warm at the counter.

delivery.a: Please call 032 341 32 41 directly to ask if a neighbourhood delivery is possible.

payment.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: Payment options can vary — please call 032 341 32 41 in advance to confirm TWINT or card.

languages.q: Which languages do you speak at the counter?
languages.a: German and Turkish are spoken; for French and English please ask in person.

footer.conceptNotice: Website preview for Alibaba 47 — not yet approved by the owner. Sample photos shown.
footer.bottomBand: Alibaba 47, Inh. A. Dündar · General-Dufour-Strasse 47 · 2502 Biel
footer.about: Kebap, grill and mezze on a corner of Biel/Bienne — Mon to Fri, walk-in or call ahead.
